preview: Don't post often. But this felt worth sharing. We have two open positions in the Solutions Department at Speed & Function, which I lead. - Project Coordinator – you're drawn to project management but
text:
Don’t post often. But this felt worth sharing.

𝗪𝗲 𝗵𝗮𝘃𝗲 𝘁𝘄𝗼 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗽𝗼𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝗶𝗻 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗦𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝗗𝗲𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗮𝘁 𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗲𝗱 & 𝗙𝘂𝗻𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝘄𝗵𝗶𝗰𝗵 𝗜 𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗱.

- Project Coordinator – you’re drawn to project management but haven’t found the right place to develop. Maybe this is it.

- Middle Software Engineer (WordPress) – you want your craft to matter somewhere. You’re not just looking for tasks.

Both remote. Both flexible. Both for people who take ownership of their own growth.

𝗜𝗳 𝘀𝗼𝗺𝗲𝘁𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀, 𝗼𝗿 𝘀𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼 𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗱, 𝗜’𝗱 𝗯𝗲 𝗴𝗹𝗮𝗱 𝘁𝗼 𝗵𝗲𝗮𝗿 𝗳𝗿𝗼𝗺 𝘆𝗼𝘂.
https://lnkd.in/dgCYdCXQ
